entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A vital legume crop in semi-arid tropics with high yield potential and adaptability

entities.name: CAJANUS CAJAN L.
entities.description: The scientific name for the pigeonpea plant

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: A geographic region characterized by low rainfall and high temperatures where pigeonpea is grown

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop output, specifically grain yield, which is limited by climate variability

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The economic gain and financial viability of pigeonpea cultivation

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability to maintain productivity and soil health over time in rainfed cultivation

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Environmental fluctuations that limit the productivity of pigeonpea

entities.name: SEEDLING AGE
entities.description: The age of seedlings (14 to 49 days) used as a parameter in transplanting methods

entities.name: ICPH2740
entities.description: A specific pigeonpea genotype that outperformed others in yield and carbon sequestration

entities.name: MARUTI
entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype evaluated in the field experiment

entities.name: TS3R
entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype evaluated in the field experiment

entities.name: DIRECT SEEDING
entities.description: A traditional method of sowing seeds directly into the field

entities.name: TRANSPLANTING
entities.description: A method of planting seedlings into the field, which can enhance yield and water productivity

entities.name: FACTORIAL RANDOMIZED BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to evaluate the impact of seedling age and genotype

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: WATER PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of water use in producing crop yield

entities.name: ECONOMIC RETURNS
entities.description: The financial gains derived from the cultivation of pigeonpea

entities.name: SOIL CARBON DYNAMICS
entities.description: The processes and changes in the amount of carbon stored in the soil

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The specific weight of harvested grains per unit area

entities.name: BENEFIT-COST RATIO
entities.description: An economic indicator used to evaluate the profitability of transplanting versus direct seeding

entities.name: SOIL CARBON SEQUESTRATION
entities.description: The process of capturing and storing atmospheric carbon in the soil

entities.name: CARBON BUILD-UP RATE
entities.description: The rate at which carbon accumulates in the soil, measured in Mg ha⁻¹ yr⁻¹

entities.name: ICRISAT, INDIA
entities.description: The location where the two-year field experiment was conducted
